title: gw1-mcp — public usage
description: Live, anonymous usage of the gw1-mcp MCP server. Only the invoked tool's NAME is ever recorded — never arguments, never identities (see the worker's /privacy page). This dashboard is code: grafana/gw1-mcp-usage.json in the repository.

options.content:
## gw1-mcp — what the server actually does, live
Anonymous per-tool call counts from the [gw1-mcp](https://github.com/Graphmaxer/gw1-mcp) MCP server (Guild Wars 1 build compiler for LLMs). **Tool names only — never arguments, never identities** ([privacy](https://gw1-mcp.graphmaxer.workers.dev/privacy)). Data: Cloudflare Workers Analytics Engine, 90-day retention, sampled (totals use `SUM(_sample_interval)`). This dashboard is versioned code — [see the JSON](https://github.com/Graphmaxer/gw1-mcp/blob/main/grafana/gw1-mcp-usage.json).

targets.query: SELECT SUM(_sample_interval) AS calls FROM gw1_mcp_usage WHERE $timeFilter AND blob1 LIKE 'tool:%'
targets.rawQuery: SELECT SUM(_sample_interval) AS calls FROM gw1_mcp_usage WHERE $timeFilter AND blob1 LIKE 'tool:%'

panels.title: Distinct tools used
panels.description: Of the 8 tools the server exposes.

targets.query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT blob1) AS tools FROM gw1_mcp_usage WHERE $timeFilter AND blob1 LIKE 'tool:%'
targets.rawQuery: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT blob1) AS tools FROM gw1_mcp_usage WHERE $timeFilter AND blob1 LIKE 'tool:%'

panels.title: Tool calls (last 24h)
panels.description: Fixed 24h window, independent of the time picker.

targets.query: SELECT SUM(_sample_interval) AS calls FROM gw1_mcp_usage WHERE timestamp > NOW() - INTERVAL '1' DAY AND blob1 LIKE 'tool:%'
targets.rawQuery: SELECT SUM(_sample_interval) AS calls FROM gw1_mcp_usage WHERE timestamp > NOW() - INTERVAL '1' DAY AND blob1 LIKE 'tool:%'

panels.title: Protocol overhead share
panels.description: initialize / resource reads vs tool work.

targets.query: SELECT round(100 * SUM(if(blob1 NOT LIKE 'tool:%', _sample_interval, 0)) / SUM(_sample_interval), 1) AS pct FROM gw1_mcp_usage WHERE $timeFilter
targets.rawQuery: SELECT round(100 * SUM(if(blob1 NOT LIKE 'tool:%', _sample_interval, 0)) / SUM(_sample_interval), 1) AS pct FROM gw1_mcp_usage WHERE $timeFilter

panels.title: Calls per tool (selected range)
panels.description: Which of the server's tools carry the usage.

targets.query: SELECT replaceOne(blob1, 'tool:', '') AS tool, SUM(_sample_interval) AS calls FROM gw1_mcp_usage WHERE $timeFilter AND blob1 LIKE 'tool:%' GROUP BY tool ORDER BY calls DESC
targets.rawQuery: SELECT replaceOne(blob1, 'tool:', '') AS tool, SUM(_sample_interval) AS calls FROM gw1_mcp_usage WHERE $timeFilter AND blob1 LIKE 'tool:%' GROUP BY tool ORDER BY calls DESC

panels.title: Hourly pulse
panels.description: All RPC traffic per hour — spikes are launch or discovery moments.

targets.query: SELECT toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL '1' HOUR) AS t, SUM(_sample_interval) AS calls FROM gw1_mcp_usage WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY t ORDER BY t
targets.rawQuery: SELECT toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL '1' HOUR) AS t, SUM(_sample_interval) AS calls FROM gw1_mcp_usage WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY t ORDER BY t

panels.title: Daily calls per tool
panels.description: The trend that answers: is the server finding its public?

targets.query: SELECT toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL '1' DAY) AS t, replaceOne(blob1, 'tool:', '') AS tool, SUM(_sample_interval) AS calls FROM gw1_mcp_usage WHERE $timeFilter AND blob1 LIKE 'tool:%' GROUP BY t, tool ORDER BY t
targets.rawQuery: SELECT toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL '1' DAY) AS t, replaceOne(blob1, 'tool:', '') AS tool, SUM(_sample_interval) AS calls FROM gw1_mcp_usage WHERE $timeFilter AND blob1 LIKE 'tool:%' GROUP BY t, tool ORDER BY t
